narrative:
Rittman Ex Vill Sd (Wayne) exempted village school district has 4,377 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.6 percentage points.
